mapper.sql: id, group_id, start_time, end_time, execute_status, error_msg, processed_records, processed_speed, heartbeat_time, finished_flag, created_time, updated_time, creator_id, updater_id, deleted
mapper.update:
UPDATE ea_archive_group_execute_task
end_time = #{endTime}, execute_status = #{executeStatus}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, processed_records = #{processedRecords}, processed_speed = #{processedSpeed}, heartbeat_time = #{heartbeatTime}, finished_flag = #{finishedFlag}, updated_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ea_archive_group_execute_task WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT t.id, t.group_id, t.start_time, t.end_time, t.execute_status, t.error_msg, t.processed_records, t.processed_speed, t.heartbeat_time, t.finished_flag, t.created_time, t.updated_time, t.creator_id, t.updater_id, t.deleted FROM ea_archive_group_execute_task t JOIN ea_archive_group g ON g.id = t.group_id AND g.deleted = 0 WHERE t.id = #{taskId} AND t.deleted = 0 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ea_user_datasource_permission p WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.datasource_id = g.source_datasource_id AND p.permission_type = 'READ' )

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ea_archive_group_execute_task
AND execute_status = #{status} AND deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ea_archive_group_execute_task t JOIN ea_archive_group g ON g.id = t.group_id AND g.deleted = 0
AND t.execute_status = #{status} AND t.deleted = 0 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ea_user_datasource_permission p WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.datasource_id = g.source_datasource_id AND p.permission_type = 'READ' )
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ea_archive_group_execute_task WHERE deleted = 0 AND group_id = #{groupId} AND execute_status IN (0, 1, 4)
SELECT FROM ea_archive_group_execute_task WHERE deleted = 0 AND group_id = #{groupId} AND execute_status IN (0, 1, 4) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ea_archive_group_execute_task WHERE deleted = 0 AND group_id = #{groupId}
SELECT FROM ea_archive_group_execute_task WHERE deleted = 0 AND group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ea_archive_group_execute_task SET execute_status = #{status}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.delete: UPDATE ea_archive_group_execute_task SET deleted = id, updated_time = NOW() WHERE deleted = 0 AND start_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{retentionDays} DAY)
mapper.select: SELECT execute_status AS status, COUNT(1) AS count FROM ea_archive_group_execute_task WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY execute_status
SELECT FROM ea_archive_group_execute_task WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM ea_archive_group_execute_task WHERE deleted = 0 AND execute_status = 3 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
